meta.name: Auto-generate sticky notes and rename nodes

parameters.content:
## Initialize workflow

Starts the workflow and sets initial variables.

## Prepare and parse nodes

Prepares nodes and parses them for further processing.

## AI logical grouping

Uses AI to logically group nodes.

## Collision handling and export

Handles collisions and merges results for export.

## Iterative adjustment

Controls loop for iterative collision fixes and picks the best result.

## Conditional node renaming

Decides and executes the renaming procedure with AI assistance.

## Final output preparation

Formats and normalizes the final workflow for output.

options.systemMessage:
=You are analyzing n8n workflows and grouping nodes based on BOTH their logical purpose AND their spatial position on the canvas.

## Your Task

1. Create logical groups of nodes that work together on the same task
2. Generate a main overview describing the workflow
3. Title and describe each group briefly

## Critical: Spatial Awareness

Nodes have [x, y] positions on a 2D canvas. The creator placed them intentionally.

- Group nodes that are BOTH logically related AND spatially close
- If two nodes do similar things but are far apart (>800px on any axis), prefer separate groups
- A group's nodes should form a visible cluster on the canvas
- When logically different nodes sit within the same spatial cluster, group them together and expand the description to cover everything that cluster does

## Grouping Guidelines

- Aim for at least {{ Math.ceil((Number($json.nodeCount) || 0) / 3) }} groups depending on workflow complexity
- Every node must belong to exactly ONE group
- Smaller, spatially tight groups are better than large sprawling ones
- A single isolated node can be its own group if it's far from others

## Naming

- Use short, descriptive titles (3-6 words)
- Sentence case
- Examples: "Fetch and validate data", "Process AI response", "Save results to database"

## Main Overview

- **howItWorks**: A numbered list of 2-6 items (each on a \n new line) explaining what the workflow does. Third person. One concise sentence per item.
- **setupSteps**: Actionable setup instructions. Focus on credentials and configuration needed. Each bullet should start with a markdown checkbox - [ ] 
- **customization**: Optional. Only include if there are obvious customization points.

## Output Rules

- Every node ID from the input must appear in exactly one group's nodeIds array
- Do not invent node IDs — only use IDs provided in the input
- Order groups by typical execution flow (trigger/input first, output/error last)

You are renaming nodes in an n8n workflow to make them more descriptive and meaningful.

## Naming Conventions

Follow these patterns based on node type:

| Node Type | Pattern | Examples |
|-----------|---------|----------|
| Triggers | "When [event]" or "[Source] Trigger" | "When Email Received", "Every Morning at 9am" |
| HTTP Request | "[Verb] [what/where]" | "Fetch YouTube Videos", "Post to Slack API" |
| Set | "[Set/Prepare/Build] [what]" | "Prepare Search Queries", "Build Output Data" |
| If | "If [condition]" or "Check [what]" | "If Download Complete", "Check Status" |
| Switch | "Route by [criteria]" | "Route by Status", "Route by Type" |
| Code | "[Verb] [what it does]" | "Calculate Duration", "Parse API Response" |
| Filter | "Filter [criteria]" | "Filter Valid Items", "Filter by Date" |
| Loop/SplitInBatches | "Loop Over [items]" | "Loop Over Results", "Process Each Video" |
| Google Sheets | "[Action] in Sheets" | "Append to Sheets", "Update Row in Sheets" |
| Wait | "Wait [duration/reason]" | "Wait 15 Seconds", "Wait for Response" |
| Limit | "Take Top [n]" or "Limit to [n]" | "Take Top 10 Results" |
| Sort | "Sort by [field]" | "Sort by Relevance Score" |
| Remove Duplicates | "Deduplicate by [field]" | "Deduplicate by Video ID" |
| Split Out | "Split [what]" | "Split Search Results" |
| Merge | "Merge [what]" | "Merge All Results" |
| AI Agent | "[Purpose] Agent" or "AI [task]" | "Content Analyzer Agent", "AI Classifier" |
| OpenAI/Anthropic | "OpenAI Model" or "Claude Model" | "OpenAI GPT-4", "Claude Sonnet" |

## Rules

1. **Be specific**: Use the node's context (URL, fields, conditions) to create meaningful names
2. **Title Case**: Capitalize each word (except small words like "to", "by", "in", "for")
3. **Under 40 characters**: Keep names concise
4. **Unique names**: Every name must be different - add specifics if needed to differentiate
5. **No special characters**: Only letters, numbers, spaces, and hyphens
6. **Action-oriented**: Start with a verb when possible (Fetch, Send, Check, Filter, etc.)

## Understanding Context

- `context.description`: Summarizes what the node does
- `context.url`: For HTTP requests, shows the API endpoint
- `context.fields`: For Set nodes, shows what fields are being set
- `context.operation`: For service nodes, shows the action (read, append, update)
- `incomingFrom` / `outgoingTo`: Shows connected nodes for understanding flow

## Examples

| Current Name | Type | Context | Better Name |
|--------------|------|---------|-------------|
| HTTP Request | httpRequest | GET youtube.com/search | Fetch YouTube Search Results |
| Set | set | fields: [query, limit] | Set Search Parameters |
| If | if | checks status == success | If Request Successful |
| Code | code | hint: "Parse duration" | Parse Video Duration |
| Google Sheets | googleSheets | operation: append | Append Results to Sheets |
| Wait | wait | 15 seconds | Wait 15 Seconds |
| Filter | filter | 2 conditions | Filter Quality Videos |

## Output

Return a rename for EVERY node. Do not skip any.

parameters.content:
## Sticky note generator and node renamer

### How it works
This workflow creates sticky notes and renames your nodes according to [our guidelines](https://n8n.notion.site/Sticky-note-guidelines-for-templates-2aa5b6e0c94f8058b0aefddd02655887?pvs=74):

@[youtube](RScKsGfrhs4)

### Setup steps
- [ ] Ensure the 'Set Workflow Variables' node is configured with correct workflow settings.
- [ ] Set up OpenAI credentials for nodes where AI processing is required.

### Customization
You can customize the node processing logic to suit specific workflows or modify AI behavior for different output requirements.

### How can we improve this workflow?
### [>>> Share your feedback here](https://templates.app.n8n.cloud/form/dbf8d22e-4b05-4328-b164-dcc5555623e0)
